summary: Tested new features: Sitemap.xml, Founder Settings API, Events gallery_images, Admin Founder tab, About/Franchise/Industrial Training pages. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed: About page with blue/white theme, Franchise page with form, Industrial Training page, Admin Founder Manager, Event gallery images section.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/sitemap.xml returns 200 with application/xml content-type
Backend: Sitemap contains XML declaration and urlset
Backend: Sitemap includes all static pages (/, /about, /founder, /programs, /events, /blogs, /faq, /contact, /franchise, /cyber-warriors, /free-counselling, /summer-training, /industrial-training)
Backend: Sitemap entries have priority and changefreq attributes
Backend: GET /api/founder-settings returns default settings
Backend: GET /api/founder-settings returns correct structure (id, name, title, image_url, message, vision, linkedin, twitter, updated_at)
Backend: PUT /api/founder-settings updates and returns updated data
Backend: PUT /api/founder-settings persists data (verified with GET)
Backend: PUT /api/founder-settings allows partial updates
Backend: POST /api/events supports gallery_images array
Backend: POST /api/events without gallery_images defaults to empty array
Backend: GET /api/events/{id} returns gallery_images
Backend: GET /api/events list includes gallery_images field
Backend: PUT /api/events/{id} can update gallery_images
Backend: POST /api/franchise-enquiry creates enquiry successfully
Backend: POST /api/franchise-enquiry validates why_franchise min length (50 chars)
Backend: POST /api/industrial-training-leads creates lead successfully
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/ root endpoint works
Frontend: About page loads with blue/white theme (data-testid='about-page')
Frontend: About page hero with gradient background
Frontend: About page shows all stats (5000+, 95%, 4, 15+)
Frontend: About page has all key sections (Building Digital Careers, The Computer Career School, Milestones, Values, What Makes Us Different)
Frontend: Franchise page loads with blue/white theme (data-testid='franchise-page')
Frontend: Franchise page shows franchise terms (5 Years, 15%, 15 KM, Auto)
Frontend: Franchise form has all fields (name, email, phone, city, location, budget, experience, why)
Frontend: Industrial Training page loads with enrollment form
Frontend: Admin login works with password etieducom@admin2025
Frontend: Admin panel has Founder tab
Frontend: FounderManager component renders (data-testid='founder-manager')
Frontend: Founder form has name, title, message, vision, linkedin, twitter fields
Frontend: Admin Events tab has 'Add Event' button
Frontend: Event form modal has 'Gallery Images (Multiple)' section
Frontend: Event form has gallery-url input with + button to add images
critical_code_review_comments: Sitemap endpoint correctly generates valid XML with all static and dynamic pages
Founder Settings API properly handles default values when no settings exist
Events model includes gallery_images as List[str] with proper defaults
FounderManager component correctly fetches and updates founder settings
Event form modal includes gallery images section with add/remove functionality
About and Franchise pages properly styled with blue/white corporate theme
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Persistent Founder data for testing - this test data exists in founder_settings collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Sitemap.xml at /api/sitemap.xml generates valid XML with all static pages and dynamic programs/blogs/branches. 2) Founder Settings API at /api/founder-settings supports GET (returns defaults) and PUT (updates). 3) Events API now includes gallery_images field as array of URLs. 4) Admin panel has Founder tab with FounderManager component for editing founder info. 5) Event form modal has Gallery Images section to add multiple image URLs. 6) About and Franchise pages redesigned with blue/white theme.

sitemap_xml: Returns valid XML with correct content-type
Includes dynamic program, blog, and branch pages
Each URL has priority and changefreq
founder_settings_api: GET returns default settings when empty
events_gallery_images: Defaults to empty array when not provided
admin_founder_tab: Form fields: name, title, image_url, message, vision, linkedin, twitter
admin_events_gallery: Event modal has Gallery Images section
